notes:
- First public release: native Qt (PySide6) rewrite of the Codex chat manager.
- Real conversation names, project grouping, move / delete / restore, smart Restart-Codex button (red when a restart is needed), 5 swappable themes, and in-app updates.
- Fix: deleting chats no longer errors with "no such table: thread_goals". Codex moved that table to goals_1.sqlite; it's now cleaned, backed up, and restorable.
